sections.title: Welcome to IDC Academy
sections.content:
## Welcome!
The IDC Academy is designed to help you master the Income Driver Calculator tool. This course will walk you through the interactive features available in this learning platform.

### What you will learn:
- How to navigate hierarchical content.
- How progress is tracked across devices.
- How to complete assessments and review your performance.

sections.title: Hierarchical Navigation
sections.content:
## Navigating Sections
Courses in the IDC Academy can be structured into **Chapters** and **Sections**. 

### The Sidebar
On the left, you will see a hierarchical menu. 
- **Chapters** act as main modules.
- **Sections** (like this one) are nested sub-topics.

You can click on any section to jump directly to it, or use the **Next** and **Previous** buttons at the bottom of the page to move through the content sequentially.

quiz.quizSynopsis: A quick check on your navigation skills.

questions.question: Where can you find the hierarchical list of course sections?
questions.messageForCorrectAnswer: Correct! The sidebar holds the course structure.
questions.messageForIncorrectAnswer: Not quite, look to the left.
questions.explanation: The sidebar uses Ant Design SubMenus to show chapters and sections.

sections.title: Automatic Syncing
sections.content:
## Never Lose Your Place
Every time you move to a new section or chapter, your progress is automatically saved to our servers. 

This means you can start a course on your desktop at the office and finish it on your laptop at home—you will always be returned to the **exact section** where you left off.

sections.title: Course Completion
sections.content:
## Marking as Complete
A chapter is marked as complete once you successfully pass its **Knowledge Check**. 

Once all chapters are completed, the course will be marked as 'Finished' in your library, allowing you to track your learning journey over time.

quiz.quizSynopsis: Validate your understanding of progress tracking.

questions.question: What happens if you close the browser in the middle of a section?
answers: I resume from the exact section
questions.messageForCorrectAnswer: Exactly! Granular resumption is a core feature.
questions.messageForIncorrectAnswer: Don't worry, we save your spot.
questions.explanation: The system stores the current_section_index in the backend progress record.
